case_title: RANNY ELENA VIQUEZ VS. RICHARD FAIRCHILD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIQUEZ, RANNY ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRCHILD, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PRODUCT DEPOT USA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIQUEZ, RANNY ELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAIRCHILD, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PRODUCT DEPOT USA $5,102.99 PRINCIPAL, $33.42 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,240.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
